scripts.test: npm run env:check && node scripts/patch-html-encoding-sniffer.mjs && vitest run
scripts.test:watch: npm run env:check && node scripts/patch-html-encoding-sniffer.mjs && vitest
scripts.lint: npm run lint:tailwind && npm run lint:patterns
scripts.ci:check: npm run env:check && npm run lint && npm run audit:i18n && npm run audit:i18n-structure && npm run audit:pages && npm run audit:structural && npm run audit:component-contracts && npm run audit:active-docs && npm run audit:overlays && npm run audit:lookup-primitives && npm run audit:api-barrel-imports && npm run audit:ui-strings:check && npm run audit:mutations:check && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.rc:check: npm run env:check && npm run ci:check && npm run e2e:smoke && npm run e2e:smoke:mobile
scripts.e2e:install: npm run env:check && node scripts/playwright.mjs install
scripts.e2e: npm run env:check && E2E_START_SERVER=1 node scripts/playwright.mjs test
scripts.e2e:smoke: npm run env:check && E2E_START_SERVER=1 node scripts/playwright.mjs test --smoke --project=chromium
scripts.e2e:smoke:mobile: npm run env:check && E2E_START_SERVER=1 node scripts/playwright.mjs test --smoke-mobile --project=mobile-chrome
